title: Preventive Antitakeover Measures: Which of the following is NOT a preventive antitakeover measure?...
summary: Distinguish preventive antitakeover measures from active defense tactics in hostile takeover situations.
prompt: Which of the following is NOT a preventive antitakeover measure?

options.text: A proxy contest for board control
Hostile bids are not a preventive measure

solution: Hostile bids are not a preventive measure; they are an active defense tactic used after a takeover attempt has been made. Preventive measures include poison pills and staggered boards.
